MagicHairDye.description: Your hair shimmers with all the colors of a prismatic shard.

MagicQuiver.description: Shoots a magic arrow at nearby enemies every {0} seconds, dealing {1}-{2} damage.

FairyBox.description: Summons a level {0} fairy companion that heals you in combat situations.

ParrotEgg.description: Summons a level {0} parrot companion, who grants you a {1} chance to find gold coins when slaying monsters.

IceRod.description: Shoots an orb of ice every {0} seconds, freezing any enemies in its path for {1} seconds.

IridiumSpur.description: Critical strikes give you a speed boost for {0} seconds.
